toolUseResult.prompt:
Search the web for modern, light, airy CSS design patterns for a collapsible top banner or "drawer" that:
- Opens on hover (not click)
- Uses very light/subtle colors (white, soft grays, maybe a hint of accent)
- Has a frosted glass or glassmorphism feel
- Feels "featherweight" — not dark or heavy
- Has a single centered call-to-action line

Search for: "CSS hover expand panel light design 2024", "frosted glass top drawer CSS", "glassmorphism banner CSS", "modern recruiter CV banner design inspiration"

Also look for: CSS backdrop-filter blur effects, smooth hover transitions (max-height or transform), and elegant monochrome/minimal palettes used in modern SaaS/portfolio sites.

Report back: 3-5 specific CSS techniques or design patterns worth using, with brief code snippets if found. Keep it under 300 words.
